data.title: Shenzhen Prosecutors Charge 30 in Major Financial Fraud Case
data.description: The Shenzhen People's Procuratorate has charged Sui Guangyi, Ma Xiaoqiu, and 28 others with crimes such as fundraising fraud, illegal public deposit absorption, and money laundering. According to NS3.AI, the accused allegedly utilized Ding Yifeng Asset Management and its affiliated companies to engage in illegal fundraising activities through deceptive financial products and 'DDO Digital Options' air tokens. Authorities have confiscated properties, vehicles, equities, and frozen bank accounts associated with the suspects.

data.title: Tim Draper Reflects on Early Bitcoin Investments and Vision
data.description:
Tim Draper, founder of Draper Associates and a renowned investor, shared insights on the X platform about his early experiences with Bitcoin. According to Odaily, Draper revealed that his initial purchase of Bitcoin was at a price of $4 per coin. His investment was driven not by an understanding of the technology or foresight into its future, but by the belief in digital currency's potential to transform the lives of those without access to traditional banking.

Draper recounted participating in a U.S. Marshals auction, where he successfully bid on 30,000 Bitcoins at $632 each, slightly above the market price of $618 at the time. Despite a subsequent drop in Bitcoin's value to $180, Draper remained committed to holding his investment. He emphasized his conviction that Bitcoin is not merely an investment but a tool capable of changing the global financial landscape.

data.title: White House Encryption Council Chief: Encryption Structures Act Passage is Only a Matter of Time; Now is the Best Legislative Window
data.description: Patrick Witt, head of the White House Crypto Committee, posted on the X platform that the newly released draft of the Senate Agriculture Committee's Crypto Market Structure Bill is a high-quality bipartisan collaboration. Its text is more than 80% similar to the House CLARITY bill. It has already received the support of a majority of Democrats on the Agriculture Committee and nearly 40% support in the House Democratic caucus. He also emphasized that under the regulatory environment of Trump and the crypto community, crypto market structure legislation is "only a matter of time." If the current window of opportunity is missed, a more stringent and punitive regulatory framework may be faced in the future.

data.title: Analysis: Options trading is bearish on ETH, and the weakening of US stock futures has triggered increased risk aversion.
data.description: Bitcoin and Ethereum prices remained relatively stable, while US stock index futures weakened as risk aversion spread, prompting traders to turn to safe-haven assets like gold and silver. However, the altcoin sector showed slight strength. LayerZero's ZRO token rose 12% in the past 24 hours, while TRX and DASH both gained approximately 3%, driven by traders' anticipation of a major upgrade in early February. Derivatives data shows that bullish traders were caught off guard by the price drop earlier this week, with Bitcoin's 30-day annualized implied volatility index (BVIV) falling back to 40%. Deribit data shows that short-term and near-term Ethereum put options are priced higher than Bitcoin put options, indicating that traders are more bearish on Ethereum. In terms of block trades, the market favors Bitcoin straddles (betting on volatility) and Ethereum put spread strategies. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Sharia Portfolio purchased 43,833 shares of Strategy stock, valued at $7 million.
data.description: Sharia Portfolio, with $2 billion in assets under management, disclosed the purchase of 43,833 shares of Strategy stock, worth $7 million. Sharia Portfolio now holds a total of 150,325 shares of Strategy stock.

data.title: Tim Draper: He first bought BTC at only $4 per coin and firmly believes that Bitcoin is not an investment but a tool to change the world.
data.description: Tim Draper, founder of Draper Associates and a well-known investor, wrote on the X platform that he initially bought Bitcoin at only $4 per coin. However, his investment at that time was not based on understanding the technology or foreseeing the future, but rather on being attracted by the idea that digital currency could bring change to people who couldn't access traditional banks. Later, when the U.S. Marshals auctioned 30,000 Bitcoins, he re-entered the fray, bidding $632 per coin (the market price at the time was $618) and winning all nine auction lots. Even though the price subsequently dropped to $180, he persisted, believing that Bitcoin was not an investment but a tool to change the "rules of the game" in the world.

data.title: CZ: I've lost the drive to do new projects.
data.description: Binance founder CZ stated in an interview at the Davos World Economic Forum, "I no longer have the drive to start new projects. After the exhausting process of starting a business once, I can't go back to that level now. So, I mainly focus on investing." Judging from both observation and data, the entire crypto asset industry has grown significantly over the past year, influenced by Trump's shift in attitude. Exposure has increased, participation has grown, and mainstream traditional financial institutions are accelerating their entry into the market. (Tencent Finance)

data.title: CZ responds to Hu Zuliu's warning that AI will amplify financial risks: The problem is not with technology, but with inherent risks in the traditional bank fractional reserve system.
data.description: Primavera Capital founder Hu Zuliu and Binance founder CZ shared the stage at the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting 2026. Addressing Hu Zuliu's concerns about the potential systemic risks induced by generative AI, CZ stated that the root of financial risk lies not in technology, but in the fundamental flaws of the traditional banking system. If the financial system itself is healthy, more efficient and cheaper technologies will always be more beneficial than harmful. CZ also pointed out that the real risk lies in the traditional banking system's "fractional reserve system." Under this system, once banks face liquidity pressures, convenient withdrawals through technology only reveal their insufficient funds, and "slowing down withdrawals" does not solve the fundamental problem. (Caixin)

data.title: RIVER Experiences Significant Drop in Value
data.description: Market data indicates that RIVER has fallen below 35 USDT, currently trading at 31 USDT. According to Odaily, this represents a 24-hour decline of 30%.

data.title: Binance applies for an EU cryptocurrency license in Greece under the MiCA framework.
data.description: Binance has applied for a MiCA license from the Greek regulatory authorities and established a local holding company. The application is reportedly being expedited, with several large accounting firms, including EY and KPMG, involved in the review process. If approved by the Hellenic Capital Markets Board, the license will allow Binance to operate and sell cryptocurrency services in all 27 EU member states under the MiCA's passport framework. (The Block)

data.title: Sui Guangyi and 30 others were prosecuted in the Dingyifeng case, which involved the issuance of "DDO digital options" worthless cryptocurrencies.
data.description: According to the official WeChat account of the Shenzhen Municipal People's Procuratorate, after legal review, the Shenzhen Municipal People's Procuratorate has filed a public prosecution with the Shenzhen Intermediate People's Court of Guangdong Province against 30 defendants, including Sui Guangyi and Ma Xiaoqiu, for crimes including fundraising fraud, illegally absorbing public deposits, and money laundering, involving Shenzhen Dingyifeng Asset Management Co., Ltd., Hong Kong Dingyifeng International Holdings Group Co., Ltd., and their affiliated companies in Shenzhen and other places. The prosecution has been charged with crimes such as fundraising fraud, illegally absorbing public deposits, and money laundering. The Futian Branch of the Shenzhen Municipal Public Security Bureau previously issued a notice stating that "Dingyifeng" and its affiliated companies issued fake wealth management products and "DDO digital options" (a type of "air coin"), engaging in illegal activities, and are suspected of committing crimes. A number of assets, including real estate, vehicles, equity, and bank account funds of "Dingyifeng" and its affiliated companies, have been seized, detained, and frozen.

data.title: Huobi HTX will list the popular AI projects SENT (Sentient) and ELSA (HeyElsa) at 9 PM and 10 PM today, respectively.
data.description: According to a Huobi HTX announcement, Huobi HTX will list two popular AI assets, SENT (Sentient) and ELSA (HeyElsa), today. SENT is considered a representative asset of the next generation of open AI networks. The specific arrangements are as follows: Huobi HTX will open deposit services for SENT and ELSA at 19:00 and 18:30 (GMT+8) on January 23. Spot trading of SENT/USDT and ELSA/USDT will open at 21:00 and 22:00 (GMT+8) on January 23, respectively. Withdrawals for SENT and ELSA will open at 21:00 and 22:00 (GMT+8) on January 24. It is understood that Sentient is building a large-scale open intelligent network (GRID) that integrates over 100 models, AI agents, data, tools, and research. HeyElsa is an AI-driven DeFi proxy layer on the BASE chain that transforms complex blockchain workflows into autonomous yield streams.

data.title: Las Vegas Businesses Increasingly Accept Bitcoin Payments
data.description: Local businesses in Las Vegas are increasingly adopting Bitcoin as a payment method, according to a video released by Solid Intel. According to PANews, the shift is driven by the lower transaction fees associated with Bitcoin compared to credit cards. This trend highlights the growing acceptance of cryptocurrency in everyday transactions, as merchants seek cost-effective alternatives to traditional payment systems.

data.title: Sharia Portfolio Acquires Additional MicroStrategy Shares
data.description: Sharia Portfolio, managing assets worth $2 billion, has disclosed the purchase of 43,833 shares of MicroStrategy (MSTR) stock, valued at $7 million. According to ChainCatcher, this acquisition brings Sharia Portfolio's total holdings to 150,325 shares of MicroStrategy.

data.title: Ethereum PoS Network Sees Surge in Staked ETH
data.description:
The number of ETH queued to join the Ethereum Proof of Stake (PoS) network has been steadily increasing, reaching 3,068,886 ETH, the highest since July 2023. According to BlockBeats, this surge reflects strong staking demand, primarily driven by Ethereum treasury companies and institutions like BitMine, which have recently staked significant amounts of ETH. On-chain data reveals that BitMine has staked a total of 1,943,200 ETH.

The activation delay for new validators is currently estimated at around 53 days and 7 hours. Meanwhile, the Ethereum PoS network's staking exit queue has been cleared, indicating that users can now almost immediately withdraw their staked ETH.

data.title: UBS plans to offer cryptocurrency trading services to select clients.
data.description: According to Bloomberg, sources familiar with the matter revealed that UBS Group AG plans to offer cryptocurrency investment services to some of its private banking clients and is currently selecting partners for this purpose. Discussions have been ongoing for months, and UBS has not yet made a final decision on how to proceed.

data.title: Sharia Portfolio, with $2 billion in assets under management, purchased 43,000 shares of MSTR, bringing its total holdings to 150,000 shares.
data.description: Sharia Portfolio, with $2 billion in assets under management, disclosed the purchase of 43,833 shares of Strategy (MSTR), valued at $7 million. Sharia Portfolio now holds a total of 150,325 shares of Strategy (MSTR). (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: A whale deposited 6,300 ETH, worth $18.63 million, into Coinbase.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, address 0x8ec…F2626 redeemed 6,300 ETH from Renzo in the past 5 hours and then deposited it into Coinbase, worth $18.63 million, which is suspected to be a sale.

data.title: William Panzera Sentenced for Fentanyl Trafficking Using Bitcoin
data.description: William Panzera has been sentenced to 12 years in prison for his involvement in trafficking fentanyl, which was paid for using Bitcoin to Chinese suppliers. According to NS3.AI, the operation facilitated the movement of over a metric ton of synthetic opioids from China into New Jersey between 2014 and 2020. This case underscores the growing use of cryptocurrency in large-scale illegal drug transactions and the challenges it presents to law enforcement agencies.
